data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for violation detection and consequence workflows.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of 'violation detection and consequence workflows' as part of the saga. However, the evidence does not provide any specific mention or confirmation of such workflows being implemented or functional. The linked use case outlines the need for these workflows but lacks concrete evidence to assert their coverage, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or availability of violation detection and consequence workflows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
